meta.title: pi-check
meta.description: Pi-Check is a AI-based "junior analyst" that does the leg work and learns from every deal.

cards.content: Startup funding based on qualitative factors
Claims in pitch decks require time-consuming analysis
Preseed canvas: All pitch decks have a similar structure
Areas of research everywhere the same
Fast pitch deck overview to get the "red" and "green" flags.
Can invest in with additional domain knowledge
Startups share their pitch via Pi-Check
Business Angels and their networks to handle dealflow
Founders: Check and do research for their ideas
Innovation managers to ideate (lean startup, stage-gate)
Gregor Heinrich,  PhD in AI, 15y+ CTO/CPO in growth companies, startup and exit experience, business angel
Konstantin Roethke, PhD in Data Science, CFA I
SOM: 2y 5% of funding costs in Germany
Over time: Acquire first-hand qualitative knowledge
theresanaiforthat.com: PitchGrade, Pitch League, All In: No structured feedback, not targeted at investors but startups

analysis.content: Pitch decks are the main communication means for the startup ecosystem. Angels and VCs get a flood of "dealflow" in their daily operations. 80% of the time they need to research things. using Google or specific databases.Theses: 1. Analysis of pitch decks and later data room information is indeed a big factor in their decisioning. The counter-argument would be that angels and VCs focus their decisions on the founders. Even then, reducing the grunt work of going through the material does allow them to focus.​​2. Automated analysis does indeed work for pitch decks. The main risk here is if information is contained in graphics and tables. This may be the reason why many tools on the market focus on improving existing decks rather than analyzing them.3. Automated market research using today's LLMs + RAG methods provides the right level of insight.
